mapper.sql: id, user_uuid, user_name, password, real_name, age, sex, birth_day, phone, last_active_time, create_time, modify_time, role, image_path, status, user_level
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user WHERE user_name = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_user (user_uuid, user_name, password, real_name, age, sex, birth_day, phone, last_active_time, create_time, modify_time, role, image_path, status, user_level) values (#{userUuid}::uuid, #{userName}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{age}, #{sex}, #{birthDay}, #{phone}, #{lastActiveTime}, #{createTime}, #{modifyTime}, #{role}, #{imagePath}, #{status}, #{userLevel})
mapper.delete: delete from t_user where id in #{id}
